title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
